name: Mandarin Hot and Sour Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dried black mushrooms and wood ears by soaking them and shredding.
2. Optional: shred cooked ham.
3. Bring soup stock to a boil, then add shredded pork, black mushrooms, and wood ears. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and seasonings (except cornstarch, eggs, and green onion) to the pot. Reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes.
5. Thicken the soup with cornstarch dissolved in water by stirring until desired consistency is reached. Turn off heat.
6. Slowly pour in beaten eggs in a thin stream while continuously stirring to incorporate into the hot soup.
7. Garnish with chopped green onion before serving.
8. If preparing the soup ahead of time, do not add cornstarch and eggs until just before serving to prevent overcooking the eggs and maintaining the proper appearance. Adjust the heat using varying amounts of white pepper and the sourness by adjusting different quantities of vinegar as desired.
